2026 National Championships

Jun 20, 2026 - Jun 28, 2026 | Ed Robson Arena | Colorado Springs, CO, United States





Visit Colorado Springs | City of Colorado Springs | Colorado Springs Airport

Registration 

  • Glen Middleton award team registration

    View, opens in a new tab

  • National Championships Registration

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Adaptive National Championships Registration

    An adaptive athlete is someone with a disability as defined by the ADA as a physical or mental impairment that substantially limits one or more major life activities, a person who has a history or record of such an impairment, or a person who is perceived by others as having such an impairment. Additional information on participating as an adaptive athlete is available here.

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Tickets

    View

  • Book a Hotel

    Book your hotel at the Hilton Garden Inn COS Downtown

    Book your hotel at the Element.

    Book your hotel at the SpringHill Suites.

    Book your hotel at the Hilton Garden Inn North COS North Air Force Academy (breakfast included)

    Book your hotel at the Homewood Suites by Hilton (breakfast included and kitchen in each room)

  • Preliminary Schedule

    As of May 22, 2026

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Final Schedule

    Updated June 11, 3:18 p.m. MT

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Start List

    Updated June 18, 7:00 p.m. MT - following Senior Nationals VFE

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Full Results

    Updated after "A" sessions

    View, opens in a new tab

  • Media Credentials

    All media must apply for media credentials for all USAW national events. All media members are REQUIRED to have 1) current U.S. Center for Safe Sport training, and, 2) effective March 2026, MUST ALSO HAVE A VALID BACKGROUND CHECK ON FILE to be approved for a credential.

    Credential approval/denial emails are typically sent 1-2 weeks before the start of competition. Background checks typically take five days to turn around, meaning that if you wait until the week of a competition to apply for a background check, you may not be approved for the competition. Please click here to submit your information to NCSI and start your background check.


    Please contact USAW at media@usaweightlifting.org with any questions.

    View, opens in a new tab

Location: Colorado Springs, CO

Venue: Ed Robson Arena

Competition Dates: June 20-28, 2026

Qualification Period: May 21, 2025 – May 21, 2026


Registration Opens: January 1, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT


Early Bird Registration ($145)

Closes: May 7, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT


Regular Registration ($175)

Closes: May 21, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT


Late Registration ($375)

Closes: June 4, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT


2026 National Youth, Junior, U25 Championships

Preliminary Schedule Released: May 23, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT

Verification of Final Entries: June 8, 2026 - 10:00-10:30 a.m. MT

Final Schedule Released:  June 10, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT


2026 National Senior Championships

Preliminary Schedule Released: May 23, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT

Verification of Final Entries: June 15, 2026 - 10:00-10:30 a.m. MT

Final Schedule Released: June 17, 2026 - 2:00 p.m. MT

Related 

  • 2026 USA Weightlifting National Event Schedule

    USAW will visit the great states of Ohio, Utah, Texas, Colorado and California in 2026

    Aug 1, 2025

TRAINING HALL 


PRIMARY TRAINING HALL

  • The primary training hall for the 2026 National Championships is inside the El Pomar Sports Center, one block from Ed Robson Arena.
  • We will once again be utilizing a signup sheet for this training hall. Please click to secure your training times.
    • ONE SIGN UP PER ATHLETE. COACHES DO NOT NEED TO TAKE A SPOT. Coaches signing up multiple athletes must mark that number when signing up for a slot (e.g.: If coach Jenny has 10 athletes that she wants to train together, she needs to enter "10" when signing up for a time slot).

El Pomar Sports Center

44 W Cache La Poudre St.

Colorado Springs, CO 80903



ALTERNATE TRAINING LOCATIONS

A few local clubs have volunteered to be alternate training sites during Nationals Week. Their info is below. Please contact these clubs directly if you have questions about their availability.  


Colorado Weightlifting Club

1361 S Broadway ste. 102, Denver, CO 80210

Contact Coach Kyle: 720-334-6173


$25 day pass, $80 full week pass

Hours 5:00 a.m.-11:00 p.m.

Sauna/Plunges also available





Vardanian Weightlifting

901 N Union Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80909

Contacts:

Email: Vardanianweightlifting@yahoo.com

Phone: 805-844-1999

Session pass: $30, full week pass: $90




Pinnacle Weightlifting

4858 Northpark Dr, Colorado Springs, CO 80918

Contact Coach Jackie: 719-439-1300

Hours:

Mon.-Fri.: 9:00 a.m.-8:00 p.m.

Saturday: 9:00 a.m.-2:00 p.m.

Day pass: $15, full week pass: $60
